title: Ability to select Q1 start
excerpt: It would be very helpful to be able to select when our Q1 starts. For example, our Q1 starts April 1st. January to March is our Q4. Right now, views are automatically set for January as the start of Q1.

posts.author: Chelsea74 (Chelsea Noble)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very helpful to be able to select when our Q1 starts. For example, our Q1 starts April 1st. January to March is our Q4. Right now, views are automatically set for January as the start of Q1.
